productDisplayName: Carlton London Men Casual White Casual Shoes
description: These nubuck loafers from carlton london are perfect downtime accessories for winter weekends. The nubuck leather upper and tonal stitch detailing enhances your style statement. Pair this with a pink T-shirt and trousers for unparalleled cool.UpperNubuck leather upper with coloured leather strips on the lateral midfoot for enhanced comfort and styleSlip-on style with elastic gores on the sides of the tongue for ease of wear and to offer a customised FitLeather inner lining for all-day, sweat-free comfortPadded and leather-lined footbed for all-day comfortOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with multi-directional lugs for absolute grip and tractionshoe careDust the upper using a nubuck brushDo not store in direct sunlight
